posts.author: ha_the_meow
posts.text: Some pointers from june 2026 concall regarding capex, debt and depreciation (screener summary). The scrip might be bottoming out- Capex is in the “final phase”; full commissioning targeted in H1 FY’27. Management: expansion program began ~4 years ago; now “entering the final phase,” with “substantial portion… commissioned and operational.” “Initial benefits” expected from the current year through higher volumes, improved availability, incremental revenue, but “full utilization and ramp-up… will take some time.” Depreciation step-up continues as CWIP capitalizes; FY’27 is peak depreciation year…
